text.title: Video Gen Service — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 30s reel pipeline — 6×5s Runway clips + ffmpeg concat + watermark.

example.title: service-config.yaml for reel pipeline
example.note: Persistent queue (r1), per-tenant quota with VIP override (r2), declarative ffmpeg ops (r3), cost cap at 95% (r4), 24h idempotency (r5).
